microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's **recovery validation program** from a 2-person operation into a platformized system, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led 0→1 development of an internal **Resilience Automation Platform**, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a scalable, self-service model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a repeatable model for continuous validation.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, serving as bridge lead for a **sovereign-cloud network isolation test** tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract requiring airtight technical and stakeholder coordination.

Built an internal **AI agent** to automate drill planning workflows, reducing planning cycle time by 39% and increasing drill capacity by 21% — directly demonstrating AI-first execution in a complex technical environment.
microsoft_2023: Championed **pre-sales-style adoption** for AI-driven code generation workflows, conducting technical demos and training sessions that drove utilization across 14 key Azure engineering teams and saved **37 engineering hours monthly**.

Surfaced critical product gaps by facilitating 11+ technical discovery interviews with Azure service teams, influencing the roadmap to prioritize **intent-based YAML generation** — translating customer feedback into shipped capability.

Improved developer experience by migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool with rigorous metadata standards, cutting lookup time by 83% and enabling faster API integration for internal users.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched Azure regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework spanning 140+ engineering and operations teams.

Drove technical discovery with 20+ service teams to identify **81 hours of manual effort** per region launch, then built a product roadmap to automate critical paths and eliminate recurring operational toil at scale.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** to surface automation gaps across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to prioritize high-impact investments and quantify ROI on infrastructure improvements in real time.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by architecting the legacy OS migration strategy and mapping software and hardware dependencies across 1,200+ robotic stations.

Drove cross-functional alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating software deployment cycles by 25% and reducing manual release overhead for embedded systems.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilize the developer intake process across a multi-team robotics program.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals, implementing a structured CRM process that improved sales cycle efficiency and conversion tracking.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website and Google Business profile to improve top-of-funnel lead quality.

Improved leadership pricing models by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records to identify margin leaks, delivering data-driven recommendations that directly informed quoting strategy.

tailoring_notes: Wove 'proof-of-concept' and 'technical discovery' framing into microsoft_2023 bullets 1–2, mirroring JD's 'technical discovery calls' and 'custom proof-of-concepts' language directly.
Used 'AI agent' (JD: 'building production-grade voice agents') and 'AI-first execution' in microsoft_ft bullet 5 to signal comfort with Deepgram's AI-first operating principle.
Injected 'pre-sales-style adoption' and 'demo' vocabulary into microsoft_2023 bullet 1 to map Azure internal enablement work onto the JD's core pre-sales demo responsibility.
Framed amazon_robotics bullet 2 around 'cross-functional alignment' and 'automated pipelines' to echo JD language about navigating complex technical cycles and API-first deployment strategies.
Used 'go-to-market strategy' and 'conversion' in pro_painters to reflect JD's consultative sales and value-proof framing, grounding even the earliest role in customer-facing technical impact.
